inputs.label: Vehicle Price
inputs.businessContext: Total price of the vehicle including any additional fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total price of the vehicle including any additional fees.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ek ücretler dahil aracın toplam fiyatı.

inputs.label: Down Payment
inputs.businessContext: Amount paid upfront that reduces the loan principal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount paid upfront that reduces the loan principal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi anaparasını azaltan peşin ödenen tutar.

inputs.label: Trade-In Value
inputs.businessContext: Value of a vehicle traded in, which reduces the amount to finance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of a vehicle traded in, which reduces the amount to finance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takas edilen aracın değeri, finanse edilecek tutarı azaltır.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax percentage on the taxable amount (vehicle price minus trade-in).

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax percentage on the taxable amount (vehicle price minus trade-in).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergiye tabi tutar (araç fiyatı eksi takas) üzerinden uygulanan satış vergisi yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Interest Rate (APR)
inputs.businessContext: Annual Percentage Rate for the loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual Percentage Rate for the loan.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the loan in months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the loan in months.
